name: Chicken Breasts and Artichokes with Fettuccini
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons sherry wine vinegar or red wine vinegar
1 can Maria artichoke hearts, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and dry the chicken breasts. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a non-aluminum skillet over low heat.
3. Add the chicken to the skillet and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon vinegar.
4. Cover and cook over low heat until fully cooked (about 3 minutes per side).
5. Remove the chicken and keep it warm, covered with foil.
6. Add another tablespoon of butter to the skillet. Cook the artichoke hearts until warmed through.
7. Remove the artichokes and set aside.
8. Deglaze the pan by stirring in 1 tablespoon vinegar.
9. Add the chicken broth and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the broth is reduced by half.
10. Stir in the heavy cream and reduce the liquid again by one-third.
11. Cook the fettuccine according to package instructions, then drain and reserve some of the cooking water.
12. In a saucepan, toss the pasta with the remaining 4 tablespoons butter. Season to taste.
13. Beat the egg yolk in a small bowl with 1 tablespoon cold water until foamy. Whisk it into the hot sauce over low heat.
14. Cook the sauce without boiling after adding the egg. If needed, add more vinegar for balance.
15. Season to taste and stir in the parsley.
16. Arrange the chicken and artichokes on a bed of fettuccine.
17. Serve with a green salad. Serves 4.
